words.def: a frame that supports a boat while it is under construction
words.zh: n. 股票；存貨；庫存量（stock的複數）

words.def: the capital raised by a corporation through the issue of shares entitling holders to an ownership interest (equity)
words.zh: n. 樹幹, 祖先, 血統, 原料, 備料, 庫存, 牲畜, 股票, 股份, 保留劇目

words.def: pecuniary reimbursement to the winning party for the expenses of litigation
words.zh: n. 費用；訴訟費；損失（cost的複數）

words.def: hosiery consisting of a cloth covering for the foot; worn inside the shoe; reaches to between the ankle and the knee
words.zh: 短襪, 襪子, 鞋內的襯墊, 輕軟鞋, 鉅款, 存款, 存錢處, 銀箱, 拳打, 一擊, 重擊

words.def: the total spent for goods or services including money and time and labor
words.zh: n. 代價, 價值, 費用

words.def: ratio of the adjacent side to the hypotenuse of a right-angled triangle
